bodyMeasurements.initialMessage: Send me your fresh body measurements, and we’ll check your progress like a coach would.
bodyMeasurements.unavailable: Measurement check-in is warming up. For now, keep tracking your numbers and we’ll plug them in soon.

conversations.cancelled: Check-in cancelled. No stress, we can come back to it when you’re ready.
conversations.safeError: Something went off plan. Let’s reset and start this check-in again.
conversations.unsupportedAction: That action isn’t available in this check-in yet.
conversations.unsupportedInput: I can’t use that input for this check-in yet.

empty.title: No measurements yet
empty.hint: Add 2+ measurements to see a trend.

insight.title: Insight
insight.text: Талія зменшується, поки вага залишається контрольованою. Схоже на рекомпозицію тіла, а не просто схуднення..
insight.noDataText: No measurements yet. Add your first weight or body measurement, and I will start building a useful progress insight from the next check-ins.
